answer: Knis recommends two-ply jute or tightly laid one-ply jute for beginners; loose-lay one-ply jute requires more finesse and is presented as better suited to experienced users.

answer: In Esinem's limited tests, jute wore several times faster than a tightly constructed linen hemp with 40 yarns per ply; the hemp also showed greater load-test strength.
